RimForce.description: Ability to pressure the rim and draw fouls.

PTS_PAINT.description: Points in the paint per 100 possessions.

AdjBLK.description: Blocks per 100 possessions over expected based on height.

AdjOREB.description: Contested offensive rebounds per 100 possessions over expected based on height.

AdjDREB.description: Contested defensive rebounds per 100 possessions over expected based on height..

Motor.description: Ability to do the little things and hustle.

Hustle.description: Loose balls recovered + charges drawn + 0.5 * box outs per 100 possessions.
